seoTitle: Castaways Beach vs Castle Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Castaways Beach and Castle Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Castaways Beach vs Castle Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Castaways Beach and Castle Creek.
heading: Castaways Beach vs Castle Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Castaways Beach, Queensland and Castle Creek, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Castaways Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Castle Creek (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Castaways Beach or Castle Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Castaways Beach has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Castle Creek scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Castaways Beach scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Castle Creek scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Castaways Beach or Castle Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Castaways Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.47% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
